problem id: 22c34f56
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00110001 -> 01100100
  11001001 -> 10001011
  11111010 -> 11101011
  01000100 -> 10000000
  01110110 -> 11100010
  00101110 -> 01011001
  00010001 -> 00100000
  01001010 -> 10011101
  00101101 -> 01011111
  11100000 -> 11011100

query: 01111111
predicted answer: 11110001
